creator: neldredge@ucsd.edu
text:
The java/diablo-jdk15 port wants tzupdater-1_3_9-2008g.zip from Sun's
website.  However Sun is currently shipping 1_3_11 and 1_3_9 doesn't
seem to be available anywhere, which prevents diablo-jdk15 from being
built in its current form.

Fix: 

Update the port to use the current version available from Sun.

Ideally, convince Sun to keep old versions available so that other
people using them don't get stranded every time Sun releases a new
version.
How-To-Repeat: portupgrade diablo-jdk
